find the start of 'ret=' and parse JSON\\nmatch = re.search(r'ret=(\\\\[.*\\\\])', content, re.DOTALL)\\nif match:\\n    # Try to find the end of the array - look for pattern that ends with }]\\n    json_str = match.group(1)\\n    # Find the closing bracket pattern\\n    bracket_count = 0\\n    end_pos = 0\\n    for i, char in enumerate(json_str):\\n        if char == '[':\\n            bracket_count += 1\\n        elif char == ']':\\n            bracket_count -= 1\\n            if bracket_count == 0:\\n                end_pos = i + 1\\n                break\\n    \\n    json_str = json_str[:end_pos]\\n    files = json.loads(json_str)\\n    \\n    for f in files:\\n        name = f.get('name', 'Unknown')\\n        file_id = f.get('id', 'Unknown')\\n        mime_type = f.get('mimeType', 'Unknown')\\n        print(f'- {name} (ID: {file_id}, Type: {mime_type})')\\nelse:\\n    print('Could not parse file list')\\n\\\"\\n\"}","tool_call_id":"toolu_01DoL8i3kukiPrCY6ZHkxuXN","id":null,"provider_name":null,"provider_details":null,"part_kind":"tool-call"}],"usage":{"input_tokens":60780,"cache_write_tokens":14735,"cache_read_tokens":46045,"output_tokens":443,"input_audio_tokens":0,"cache_audio_read_tokens":0,"output_audio_tokens":0,"details":{"cache_creation_input_tokens":14735,"cache_read_input_tokens":46045,"input_tokens":0,"output_tokens":443}},"model_name":"claude-opus-4-5-20251101","timestamp":"2026-02-07T11:01:47.142386Z","kind":"response","provider_name":"anthropic","provider_url":"https://api.anthropic.com","provider_details":{"finish_reason":"tool_use","zo_persona_id":"74e0a70d-398a-4337-bcab-3e5a3a9d805c","zo_persona_name":"Vibe Architect"},"provider_response_id":"msg_013uXac5Hx79tZKZeDJsRmZC","finish_reason":"tool_call","run_id":"ba881542-a8f7-4841-a389-d9b5eeb8e4d4","metadata":null}
